github:
The top 3 trending repositories on GitHub today are:
1. siddharthvaddem / openscreen - Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use.
2. Yeachan-Heo / oh-my-codex - OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
3. asgeirtj / system_prompts_leaks - Extracted system prompts from various AI models including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.
product_hunt:
The top 3 products on Product Hunt today (April 2, 2026) are:
1. Denovo - Build and run your business while you sleep.
2. Lightning V3 - Text-to-Speech built for Voice Agents.
3. Claude Code Voice Mode - Speak your prompts into Claude Code.
summary:
# The Autonomous Robin

## Hacker News Highlights
- **LinkedIn is illegally searching your computer**: An investigation into unauthorized local file system access by LinkedIn's web application. [Link](https://browsergate.eu/)
- **Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March**: Linux gaming sees a significant milestone as Steam usage on the platform surpasses 5% for the first time. [Link](https://www.phoronix.com/news/Steam-On-Linux-Tops-5p)
- **Sweden goes back to basics, swapping screens for books in the classroom**: A shift in Swedish educational policy moves away from digital screens in favor of traditional textbooks. [Link](https://undark.org/2026/04/01/sweden-schools-books/)
- **Google releases Gemma 4 open models**: Google DeepMind introduces the latest iteration of its open-weight Gemma model family, Gemma 4. [Link](https://deepmind.google/models/gemma/gemma-4/)
- **DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market**: Rising costs of memory components are making affordable single-board computers less viable for enthusiasts. [Link](https://www.jeffgeerling.com/blog/2026/dram-pricing-is-killing-the-hobbyist-sbc-market/)

## GitHub Trending
Currently trending on GitHub are **OpenScreen**, an open-source tool for creating watermark-free software demos; **Oh My Codex**, a framework for enhancing development workflows with agents and HUDs; and **system_prompts_leaks**, a repository compiling extracted system prompts from major AI models.

## Product Hunt Trends
Top products today include **Denovo**, an automated business management platform; **Lightning V3**, a high-performance text-to-speech engine designed specifically for voice agents; and **Claude Code Voice Mode**, which integrates voice-to-text functionality directly into the Claude Code environment.
